proof_boundary: This contract defines live-payment activation evidence. It does not create Stripe objects, enable checkout, charge customers, or approve public launch.

required_evidence_categories.label: Launch scope and paid-scope decision
required_evidence_categories.why: The product must charge for preparation only, not approval, legal advice, buyer validation, supplier verification, or shipment decisions.

required_evidence_categories.label: Stripe live-mode account review
required_evidence_categories.why: A test-mode account or local checkout contract is not live activation proof.

required_evidence_categories.label: Live products, prices, checkout, and portal proof
required_evidence_categories.why: Live-mode objects must match the approved paid scope before any customer can pay.

required_evidence_categories.label: Production webhook endpoint
required_evidence_categories.why: Live checkout needs a production webhook endpoint tied to the deployed environment.

required_evidence_categories.label: Webhook signature verification
required_evidence_categories.why: Payment events must be authenticated before updating billing state.

required_evidence_categories.label: Webhook idempotency, duplicate, delayed, and ordering tests
required_evidence_categories.why: Billing state must tolerate retries, duplicates, delayed events, and out-of-order events.

required_evidence_categories.label: API version, error handling, and logging
required_evidence_categories.why: Operators need stable API behavior, logged failures, and traceable payment errors before activation.

required_evidence_categories.label: Secure API keys, secrets storage, and rotation
required_evidence_categories.why: Live secret keys must be stored outside source code and local files with an owner and rotation process.

required_evidence_categories.label: Tax, accounting, and invoice review
required_evidence_categories.why: Live payments need tax/accounting treatment and invoice policy reviewed for the launch scope.

required_evidence_categories.label: Refund, support, and dispute policy
required_evidence_categories.why: Customers need clear refund/support handling before money is accepted.

required_evidence_categories.label: Payment security and PCI-scope review
required_evidence_categories.why: The product must document that card data is handled by the payment provider and review remaining payment-security scope.

required_evidence_categories.label: Claim language, checkout copy, and receipt wording review
required_evidence_categories.why: Checkout and receipts must not imply customs approval, legal advice, buyer validation, supplier verification, or shipment approval.

required_evidence_categories.label: Activation owner go/no-go
required_evidence_categories.why: A named accountable owner must approve the exact live-payment scope and rollback path.

source_anchors.name: Go-live checklist
source_anchors.product_use: Live-mode objects, API versions, logging, webhook, event, and key readiness anchor.

source_anchors.name: Webhooks
source_anchors.product_use: Production webhook endpoint, delivery, retry, and event handling anchor.

source_anchors.name: Resolve webhook signature verification errors
source_anchors.product_use: Webhook signing secret and signature verification evidence anchor.

source_anchors.name: Idempotent requests
source_anchors.product_use: Duplicate and retry-safe request handling anchor.

source_anchors.name: API keys
source_anchors.product_use: Live/test key boundary and secret-key handling anchor.

source_anchors.name: Testing
source_anchors.product_use: Test-mode evidence boundary; test payment success is not live activation proof.
